title: Add tests for BuildGoalRequest origin validation (including typo regression guard)
description:
## Evidence
No existing test covers the `BuildGoalRequest.Parameters` null-check logic. The `OriginZ`/`OriginY` typo (TSK-0087) was never caught by tests because there are no tests for partial-origin rejection.

## What's needed
1. Test: all three origins present → Parameters is non-null with correct values
2. Test: OriginX null → Parameters is null
3. Test: OriginY null → Parameters is null (would have caught the typo)
4. Test: OriginZ null → Parameters is null
5. Test: all three null → Parameters is null

## Verification
Overlooked by all 5 audits. See `Data/Pages/audits/msa-audit-verification-6-23.md` section O2.
